# [#dual_binary_bridge]

## |[ DUAL::BINARY_PAIRS.v1.0 ]|
64 DUALITIES → 32 BINARY STATES (2:1 Mapping Table)
_Each duality pair must pass through its logic lock (binary gate) to execute action._

Format:
- 2 dualities per logic switch
- Used for ritual entry, fusion logic, recursion limits

| Pair ID | Dualcore A <> B | Binary Pair | Lock Type |
|---------|---------------------------------------------|--------------------|----------------------|
| P01 | abstract <> concrete & complex <> simple | on/off | logic gate |
| P02 | foreign <> local & chaos <> order | true/false | system integrity |
| P03 | machine <> organic & sacred <> mundane | live/dead | form gate |
